name: Initial D - Interval
description:
Initial D based RPG set between 3rd and 4th stage, meant to fill the gap between the ending of the Akina's Eight-Six arc and the start of the Project D arc.

Essentially my headcanon.

Publish your chats and leave reviews please! I'd love to see what people are doing with my bots!

Want the same experience but less Initial D based? Try out the Kaido bot, it's much more fleshed out IMO.

!!READ THIS!!

I cannot guarantee this bot will work as intended, I am very inexperienced when it comes to making RPG bots. If you have trouble with this bot you are better off using the CharacterAI version here, or you should use a model like Gemini or Deepseek. JLLM gets confused too often, especially with such a low context limit.
creator: TCR354
